plugins.name: game-engines
plugins.description: Build 2D and 3D browser games with Phaser 3, Three.js, and Capacitor for iOS

plugins.name: game-art
plugins.description: Build and refine 2D pixel-art and sprite assets: animated spritesheets, Aseprite parsing, sprite-sheet pipelines, and pixel-grid snapping

plugins.name: game-features
plugins.description: Add game features like real-time multiplayer, co-op, and PvP

plugins.name: media
plugins.description: Generate game-ready images, video, audio, and 3D assets with the vg media CLI — characters, cinematics, sprites, and voiceover

plugins.name: tooling
plugins.description: Developer tooling for deploying games, frontend testing, and skill authoring
